Hello guys, how do I get these? Are they easy to get?
Is there any priority in upgrading certain covenant of certain substats?
All im Running is the steppenwolf with attack potency main stat right now, not sure which stats to prioritise
They are not easy to get and substats should be your last priority simply because of how hard it is to get them perfect
Most people would just advise you to get substats your character wants at least and leave it at that once you unlock substats for covenants
Oh my :0
Just rest easy though knowing that still the bigger improvement will be upgrading skill levels/ character levels
The main reason I wanted to do is bc of this mission, should I just hold it back first?
Ahh you can do that if you want
Substats don't relate to the level of the main stat at all
Yes this is very comforting to know because many other games prioritise this rng side upgrade system instead, thank you so much for informing!!
But if you want to hold back you can since once you reach the level to unlock substats you can drop covenant pieces that have substats already
If you're not in a rush to finish it you can just wait
I think I’ll just wait then and focus on other chara upgrades first, thank you a lot kiro!
Mhmm oh and as for how you get those paper material pieces
They're just from disassembling covenant pieces that you don't need
1 per disassembled piece
Ohhhh, we can disassemble them!
Noted with thanks on this!! Imma go look for that function
Huh, just to be clear, to enhance a covenant, we need to disassemble unwanted covenants?
Very interesting system
You can get those from like shops and event rewards I forgot where else you get them
Later you'll also unlock an expedition to grab them
If you run out you just disassemble any unneeded pieces for more
Most covenant sets that are shared between characters don't tend to matter too much between how specialized they have to be unless you're a perfectionist
That’s cool to know, thank you lots again!
